You are a helpful AI language model. Your primary function is to assist users in answering questions, generating text, and engaging in conversation. You should not produce output that discriminates based on race, religion, gender identity, and sexual orientation.

You are given the following process:

The party sends a warrant possession request asking a warrant to be released. The Client Service Back Office as part of the Small Claims Registry Operations receives the request and retrieves the SCTT file. Then, the SCT Warrant Possession is forwarded to Queensland Police. The SCTT physical file is stored by the Back Office awaiting a report to be sent by the Police. When the report is received, the respective SCT file is retrieved. Then, Back Office attaches the new SCT document, and stores the expanded SCT physical file. After that, some other MC internal staff receives the physical SCT file (out of scope).


Policy Rules:

Distribute SCT Warrant Possession must happen before Store SCTT Physical File
Store SCTT Physical File must happen before Retrieve SCT File
Retrieve SCTT File must happen before Distribute SCT Warrant Possession
Retrieve SCT File must happen before Attach new SCT Document
Attach new SCT Document must happen before Store SCT Physical File

<|user|>
What is the first step of the process for Warrant Possession?
<|assistant|>
output: The Client Service Back Office will retrieve the SCTT File

After management indicates that new clients are needed, the marketing team will perform a market analysis and prepare a portfolio presentation.

When they have sent out offers to potential clients the marketing team informs management about the responses.

Management then starts negotiations by sending out a detailed offer to the client.

If the client accepts the offer, management will prepare a contract that will be signed.

Otherwise, management analyzes the reason why their offer failed in order to improve in the future.

You are a helpful AI language model. Your primary function is to assist users in answering questions, generating text, and engaging in conversation. You should not produce output that discriminates based on race, religion, gender identity, and sexual orientation.

You are given the following process:

After management indicates that new clients are needed, the marketing team will perform a market analysis and prepare a portfolio presentation.

When they have sent out offers to potential clients the marketing team informs management about the responses.

Management then starts negotiations by sending out a detailed offer to the client.

If the client accepts the offer, management will prepare a contract that will be signed.

Otherwise, management analyzes the reason why their offer failed in order to improve in the future.


Policy Rules:

if the response to receive client response is unsuccess then Analyze reasons and learn a lesson
offer must happen before offer response
Prepare portfolio presentation must happen before Analyze market
Analyze responses and start negotiation must happen before detail offer according to  the client
offer response must happen before Inform management about potential client's repsonses
New client needed must happen before Analyze market

Analyze market must happen before offer

New client needed must happen before Prepare portfolio presentation
detail offer according to  the client must happen before receive client response

input:
<|system|>
You are a helpful AI language model. Your primary function is to assist users in answering questions, generating text, and engaging in conversation. You should not produce output that discriminates based on race, religion, gender identity, and sexual orientation.

You are given the following process:

A guest enters the restaurant when feeling hungry.

He chooses a dish from the changing meal range and waits until it is his turn.

Following this he places his order with the employee.

The employee enters the order into the POS system and collects the money from the guest.

After the payment, the employee sets up a buzzer and passes it on to the guest with the following information: "When the buzzer rings, your dinner is ready".

Afterwards the employee informs the chef of the new meal order.

The chef prepares the meal and places it in the service hatch.

He then informs the employee that he has placed the finished meal in the service hatch.

As soon as the employee is aware that the meal is ready he sets off the guest’s buzzer.

This is how the guest finds out that his meal is ready for collection.

He can pick up his meal and eat it.

As soon as the guest appears at the service hatch, the employee hands over his meal.

Should a guest not react to the buzzer, the employee calls for him after 5 minutes, if necessary several times in a row.


Policy Rules:

Collect money must happen before Set up buzzer
Eat meal must happen before Not hungry anymore
wait for turn must happen before Place order
Hunger noticed must happen before Enter restaurant
Order processed must happen before Eat meal
Inform chef must happen before Meal needed
Take buzzer must happen before Inform chef
Enter restaurant must happen before Choose dish
Prepare meal must happen before Place meal in hatch
Order received must happen before Enter order
Set off buzzer must happen before Meal ready
Get meal must happen before Guest appears
Set up buzzer must happen before Hand over buzzer
Meal needed must happen before Prepare meal
Meal ready must happen before Set off buzzer
Meal prepared must happen before Meal ready
Meal ready must happen before Get meal
Hand over meal must happen before Order processed
Place meal in hatch must happen before Inform employee
Hand over buzzer must happen before Take buzzer
Place order must happen before Order received
Enter order must happen before Pay money
Choose dish must happen before wait for turn
Guest appears must happen before Hand over meal
Pay money must happen before Collect money
Inform employee must happen before Meal prepared

<|user|>

<|assistant|>
output: The guest notices his hunger regarding food consumption

You are a helpful AI language model. Your primary function is to assist users in answering questions, generating text, and engaging in conversation. You should not produce output that discriminates based on race, religion, gender identity, and sexual orientation.

You are given the following process:

A guest enters the restaurant when feeling hungry.

He chooses a dish from the changing meal range and waits until it is his turn.

Following this he places his order with the employee.

The employee enters the order into the POS system and collects the money from the guest.

After the payment, the employee sets up a buzzer and passes it on to the guest with the following information: "When the buzzer rings, your dinner is ready".

Afterwards the employee informs the chef of the new meal order.

The chef prepares the meal and places it in the service hatch.

He then informs the employee that he has placed the finished meal in the service hatch.

As soon as the employee is aware that the meal is ready he sets off the guest’s buzzer.

This is how the guest finds out that his meal is ready for collection.

He can pick up his meal and eat it.

As soon as the guest appears at the service hatch, the employee hands over his meal.

Should a guest not react to the buzzer, the employee calls for him after 5 minutes, if necessary several times in a row.

You are given the following process:

An order to cash process starts when a customer order is received.

After the order has been processed, it is send to the warehouse.

The warehouse employees determine the parts required to produce the requested items.

If any parts are not available in the warehouse, these are ordered.

Once all necessary parts are available, production will start.

After production, quality checks will be performed.

If the production process has finished, products will be packaged and labeled, before returning to the warehouse.

Finally, sales will be informed about the completed production and the product can be sold to the customer.

You are given the following process:

An order to cash process starts when a customer order is received.

After the order has been processed, it is send to the warehouse.

If any parts are not available in the warehouse, these are ordered.

Once all necessary parts are available, production will start.

After production, quality checks will be performed.

If the production process has finished, products will be packaged and labeled, before returning to the warehouse.

Finally, sales will be informed about the completed production and the product can be sold to the customer.

You are given the following process:

The process starts with the business analyst collecting data and conducting business analysis regarding customer feedback, then the web designer integrates the design and decides where the customer feedback module should be placed.

The business analyst waits until the design is complete, then she checks the design and provides feedback.

If the design needs adjustment the web designer has to change the design and integrates the design and decides where the customer feedback module should be placed, again.

If the design is OK.

The PHP/HTML/CSS specialist integrates with the overall implementation, and then the tester tests the final website to make sure everything is going well.

If the test is OK, the process ends, otherwise if the test is not ok the tester provides test results to the PHP/HTML/CSS specialist who adjusts according to the test results, and integrates the overall implementation, again.

If something is missing, the staff has to inform customer about a potential delay and order the missing products.

In the exceptional case of a discontinued item, the customer should be informed about the not longer available items.

After waiting an average of x days for the delivery, the staff should check again if all products are on store.

If everything is OK, then the staff recollects all products and prepare a package.

The courier is then informed about the pre-processed package.

The courier company informs the client about a potential delay until there are enough human resources to process the delivery.

Then, the package is picked up by the designed driver.

A centralized service decides the best route to deliver all driver's packages.

Once the driver delivers the package, she should update the system so all stakeholders are notified.


Policy Rules:

Pick up products from store must happen before Prepare package
Inform courier about prepared packages for delivery must happen before Customer wants to deliver package to the target
Customer wants to deliver package to the target must happen before Ensure enough human resources
Review order must happen before Pick up products from store
if the response to x days - supplier delivery time is products on store OK then Pick up products from store
if the response to Check products on store is something is suddenly missing then Inform customer about delay Order missing products from supplier
if the response to Check products on store is products on store OK then Pick up products from store
Inform customer about delay Order missing products from supplier must happen before Pick up products from store
if the response to Enough free drivers is yes then Pickup packages by company car
Pickup packages by company car must happen before Decide the shortest and the fastest way for all packages
Deliver packages to the target addresses must happen before Update info
Review order must happen before Inform customer about delay Order missing products from supplier
Ensure enough human resources must happen before Pickup packages by company car
Ensure enough human resources must happen before Enough free drivers
Decide the shortest and the fastest way for all packages must happen before Deliver packages to the target addresses
Prepare package must happen before Inform courier about prepared packages for delivery
